---
title: "collaboration_guide"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Description

What a pull request is and why review matters?

## Methods

First, a new branch was created from the main branch to isolate changes related to a specific issue. Edits and additions were made locally, then staged, committed with descriptive messages, and pushed to the remote repository. A pull request (PR) was then opened to propose merging these changes back into the main branch.

## Discussion

Pull requests are essential because they create a structured checkpoint between writing code and integrating it into a shared project. They promote collaboration by allowing team members to review each other’s work, catch errors early, and suggest improvements before changes become permanent.
